title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1004
summary: Sandeep Kumar Mehta, a proprietor of Mahasu Apple Trades, was accused of receiving large quantities of apples from multiple growers between 2015 and 2020 without making payments. An FIR was filed in 2020, alleging a total unpaid amount exceeding ₹6.7 crores.
